# UiHost.SandboxDeniedAccess property

The access categories a sandboxed UI MUST be denied: the embedding document's DOM, cookies, storage, and navigation (spec §26.7, R-26.7-a, R-26.7-b). A host renders the UI in an isolated browsing context that blocks every one of these.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> SandboxDeniedAccess { get; }
```
